footer.tagline: Building digital experiences in Gibraltar & La Linea

hero.name: Ethan Roworth
hero.title: Web Design, AI Automation & SEO
hero.subtitle: Crafting distinctive digital experiences for businesses in Gibraltar and La Linea de la Concepcion.

webDesign.title: Web Design
webDesign.description: Custom websites that look incredible and convert visitors into customers. Mobile-first, fast, and SEO-ready.

aiAutomation.title: AI Automation
aiAutomation.description: Smart workflows and automations that save you hours every week. Let AI handle the repetitive stuff.

seo.title: SEO
seo.description: Organic traffic through multilingual content, keyword targeting, and technical SEO. Built to rank.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We talk about your business, your goals, and what you need. No jargon, just a real conversation.

design.title: Design
design.description: I create a design that fits your brand and speaks to your audience. You see it before anything gets built.

build.title: Build
build.description: Your site gets built with clean code, fast loading times, and SEO baked in from the start.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: We go live. I make sure everything works perfectly and hand you the keys to your new digital home.

about.label: About Me
about.title: The person behind the pixels
about.quote: I quit the 9-to-5 at 19 to build the web.
about.description: I'm Ethan, 19, based in Gibraltar. I quit the 9-to-5 to build websites, automate workflows, and grow businesses through SEO. Currently managing 16+ sites across real estate, tourism, and local services.

ctaSection.title: Let's build something.
ctaSection.description: Got a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Whether it's a new website, an automation workflow, or an SEO strategy, let's make it happen.
